questions.question: Describe two software testing techniques that can be used to enhance software quality. Explain how each technique contributes to the overall quality of the software.
questions.hint: Provide examples or definitions to support your answer

questions.question: What is the difference between equivalence partitioning and boundary value analysis? Provide an example of when to use each technique.
questions.hint: Outline the technical differences between the two techniques

questions.question: Explain the concept of code reviews and its role in enhancing software quality. Describe the benefits of regular code reviews.
questions.hint: Provide examples of how code reviews can improve software quality
